title: SpecGate Component Spec
description: Schema for SpecGate .spec.yaml files — declares inputs, types, outputs, and test cases for a single component.

binding.description: Binding file identifier. Resolves to bindings/<binding>.yaml.

target.description: Name of the execution target defined in the binding file (e.g. 'build', 'test', 'validate')

inputs.description: Named inputs to the component. Each key is an input name, value describes its type.

types.description: Named type definitions. Each key is a type name referenced by inputs or outputs.

outcome.description: Outcome declaration. Use oneof for variant outcomes, or a string for a single outcome type.

outputs.description: Output declarations keyed by outcome branch, e.g. 'when Valid'.

additionalProperties.description: Named outputs for this outcome branch.

source.description: Where to observe this output. E.g. 'build-artifact', 'compiler-output'.

inputDeclaration.description: An input declaration with type, optional source annotation, and optional description.

source.description: Where this input comes from if not a function argument. E.g. 'fixture-file', 'env-var'.

typeDefinition.description: A named type. Use 'oneof' for variant types, 'causes' for error types, or bare keys / 'fields' for records.

oneof.description: Variant type (discriminated union) — each key is a variant name, value is an object describing its fields.

causes.description: Error type — each key is a possible cause name, value is an object describing its fields. Maps to error chains (Rust/ohno) or OneOf (C#), not discriminated unions.

fields.description: Record type — each key is a field name, value is a type expression string.

desc.description: Human-readable description of what this case tests and why.

inputs.description: Input values for this case. Keys must match the spec's inputs.

expected.description: Expected outputs. Must include 'outcome' and any output fields declared for that outcome branch.
